title: Fantasy and Bettercraft
description: Bring more happiness to Minecraft blocks and items!
body:
![Logo](https://i.imgur.com/me5FF2F.png)


# ABOUT:

Fantasy Craft improves vanilla minecraft blocks and items, making for a better experience.
Inspired by Jappa, but with my personal style, and FPS friendly.


# FEATURES:

* 3D rails.
* 3D ladder + better texture.
* 3D enchanting table + better animated texture.
* Random bookshelfs
* 3D mushroom and fungus + better items.
* Dragon Egg Improvement + better animated texture.
* Improvement in texture of terracotta and glazed terracotta.
* Water and Lava texture improvement + FPS friendly
* Improved End Sky, Sun, Moon phases, Rain and Snow less invasive.
* New Chests

In future updates I will improve the torch, portal, crops, and others. ❤
I will NOT improve all blocks or items, only the ones that can be improved.

![IMPORTAT](https://i.imgur.com/EjFOwtq.png)
